prompt: Initialize Teamwork project context when global readiness reports an actionable gap and an optional external tool is unavailable.
must: report readiness gaps and continue safe project-context setup without copying Teamwork skills or agents into the project
read the installed profile and material model configuration instead of relying on a timeless mapping embedded in Init
treat native interaction tools as host-owned capabilities
request approval before installing external tooling
must_not: hard-gate project instructions, memory, or CodeGraph context on a global configuration failure
create project-local Teamwork skill or agent copies
change user configuration to make a host interaction tool available
install an unavailable external tool without approval
evidence: Static package contract only; it does not prove live host behavior.
